properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once a true believer Once there was a fire in your soul You were the epitome of blessed faith astir With thirst for holiness And hunger for the Word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now you move in other circles To the beat of different drums And I see only glimpses of the one you used to be The inspiration that you were to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I miss the way His love would dance within your eyes I miss the way His heart was the soul of your life And somewhere in the saddest part of heaven's room Our Father sheds a tear for you He's missing you, too!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Some are calling you a prodigal Some aren't calling you at all But far away someone is calling you back home Do you hear it anymore out there on your own

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I miss the way His love would dance within your eyes I miss the way His heart was the soul of your life And somewhere in the saddest part of heaven's room Our Father sheds a tear for you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, Oh, I Miss The Way, (I Miss The Way) Oh, Oh, I Miss The Way.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And somewhere in the saddest part of heaven's room Our Father sheds a tear for you He's missing you, too
